inline_comments.message: Why has "measurement=ves-measurement" been removed and how that goes together with the latest version of the schema (https://github.com/onap/dcaegen2-collectors-ves/blob/master/etc/CommonEventFormat_30.2_ONAP.json) which still allows "measurement" as the only domain value to map events to ves-measurement topic?

I created a bug ticket https://jira.onap.org/browse/DCAEGEN2-2482 and correction candidate https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/dcaegen2/platform/blueprints/+/113804. I admit that I don't fully understand what https://jira.onap.org/browse/DCAEGEN2-2264 brings though so if there's a new different way of sending VES measurement events (or configuring VES Collector for them), feel free to set me straight
Good catch. Agreed "measurement" domain mapping should not have been removed (also "measurementsForVfScaling" is required for VES 5.4.1 and prior versions)
